Statistical Insights & Anomalies
⚠ Western Electric Rule 1 CRITICAL

Rule 1: 2 point(s) outside the 3σ control limits (at indices [128, 174]).

Meaning: A data point beyond ±3σ from the mean is statistically rare (~0.27% chance under normality). Its presence strongly suggests a special-cause event — something changed in the process at that moment.

Action: Identify and investigate the specific points flagged. Check for equipment malfunction, operator changes, raw material variation, or measurement errors. Remove confirmed special causes before computing...

ℹ Trend Stable INFO

No statistically significant trend detected in the process data.

Meaning: The Spearman correlation coefficient (τ = -0.018) and p-value (p = 0.7629) indicate no systematic drift in the process over time.

Action: Continue routine monitoring. The process is temporally stable.
